creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

John is aware of issues surrounding the merging of the crypto 
collections.  As mentioned on the -current mailing list, he'll 
sort all this stuff out when the dust has settled. 

Further PRs along the lines of "fix documentation to reflect 
the removal of the cvs-crypto collection" should be closed 
as duplicates of this one.
